prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-STEELDIGGER-GRN Product Type: SHOVEL_SPADE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 13" Serrated Edge Digger, Versatile Hand Trowel for Breaking up Hard Ground Description: Easily break through compacted gravel, hard soil and stubborn roots with the ASR Outdoor Serrated Edge Digger.

This versatile 13" hand trowel is constructed of heavy duty heat treated carbon steel that will allow you to shovel through the tough materials. It features a serrated edge that is designed for easily cutting through top layers of brush and soil while on the hunt for lost possesions or at home gardening so you can plant new seeds with ease. The blade itself is 7.5 inches in length, so you can count on it to dig deep into whatever earth you're working with.

The garden digger features a high visibility bright orange handle with an ergonomic grip to prevent slippage during use, and it even comes with a nylon sheath to protect the serrated edges when not in use. The sheath also features a belt loop so you can attach it to your belt while you're working. This is a great multi-purpose digging tool for gardeners and metal detector hobbyist a like. Search Terms: digging garden trowels gardening shovels serrated metal detecting carbon steel hand ergonomic handles sharp metal detector digger tool find lost treasure beach combing Features: - DOUBLE EDGE SERRATED BLADE - The 7.5 inch carbon steel blade is designed to penetrate hard soil and overburden with ease; use the double edge to saw into the ground in either direction to pull out clean clumps of earth to expose your find or simply plant some seeds like Johnny Appleseed === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13" Serrated Edge Digger Hand Trowel
